gabor       2007-02-02 14:09:36 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    security             Makefile 
  Added files:
    security/aolserver-nsopenssl Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                 pkg-plist 
  Log:
  An AOLserver socket driver module which implements SSL/TLS encryption on
  incomming sockets, and also adds an https client API.
  
  WWW: http://www.aolserver.com/
  
  - Martin Matuska
  martin@matuska.org
  
  PR:             ports/105781
  Submitted by:   Martin Matuska <martin@matuska.org>
  Approved by:    erwin (mentor)
